name: UiBase.AircraftTypes

aliases.name: GenericAircraftData
aliases.comment: Data that is common to all kinds of aircraft related entities
aliases.type: { id : Basics.Int, name : String.String, notes_markdown : String.String, misnomers : List.List String.String }

aliases.name: RelatedToAircraft
aliases.comment:
All the typed entities related to some particular typed aircraft data, grouped by type and including the base.
There will never be other items of the same type.

aliases.name: RelatedToSearch
aliases.comment: All the typed entities related to a particular search, grouped by type

aliases.name: TypedAircraftData
aliases.comment: Generic aircraft data plus an aircraft type

aliases.name: TypedAircraftList
aliases.comment: List of generic aircraft data of the same aircraft type

values.name: aircraftTypeString
values.comment: Convert an aircraft type to a string

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Check of a typed aircraft list is empty

values.name: toTypedList
values.comment: Convert a list of a single type of entity to a generic list that holds items typed individually

name: UiBase.Alerts

values.name: alert
values.comment: Display an alert, inline on the page

name: UiBase.Buttons

values.name: actionButton
values.comment: Largest button that indicates you can do something

values.name: mediumActionButton
values.comment: Medium button that indicates you can do something

values.name: pageSelectButton
values.comment: Button for right hand top menu that selects a page

values.name: smallActionButton
values.comment: Smallest button that indicates you can do something

name: UiBase.Colors
comment:
Predefine some colors by role. Uses phollyer/elm-ui-colors, which I recommend for
named colors.


# Colours by role

@docs navBackground, navTextColour

values.name: navBackground
values.comment: Return navigation background colour

values.name: navTextColour
values.comment: Return navigation text colour

values.name: defaultRounding
values.comment: Default rounding

name: UiBase.OnKey

values.name: onEnter
values.comment: Send msg when Enter key is pressed

values.name: onEscape
values.comment: Send msg when Escape key is pressed

values.name: onKey
values.comment:
Send msg when keyValue key is pressed. Keyvalue must be a string that is the value of a particular key

        onKey "Enter" msg

        onKey "Q" msg

name: UiBase.Product

aliases.name: Product
aliases.type: { id : Basics.Int, source : String.String, manufacturer : String.String, product_code : String.String, description : String.String, scale : String.String, category : String.String, url : String.String, image_url : Maybe.Maybe String.String, price : String.String, display_short_description : Basics.Bool, indexed : Basics.Bool, first_seen : Date.Date }

aliases.name: SortDescription
aliases.comment: Details of what column is currently sorted, and how to sort it
aliases.type: { columnName : String.String, accessor : UiBase.Product.Product -> String.String, direction : UiBase.Product.SortDirection }

values.name: sortDirection
values.comment: Given a column name and the current sort description, determine the appropriate sort direction

values.name: toggleSort
values.comment: Given a column name to sort on and the current sort description, determine the new sort description

name: UiBase.ProductTable

values.name: productTable
values.comment: The overall table
values.type: (String.String -> (UiBase.Product.Product -> String.String) -> msg) -> (Basics.Int -> msg) -> Date.Date -> UiBase.Product.SortDescription -> List.List UiBase.Product.Product -> Element.Element msg

name: UiBase.RelatedItemButtons

values.name: relatedItemButton
values.comment: Related item button

values.name: searchResultButton
values.comment: Search result button

name: UiBase.RelatedItems

values.name: relatedAircraftSections
values.comment: All of the sections of related items by type, including headings and lists

values.name: relatedItemsListAsRow
values.comment: All the related items of a single type as a single row

values.name: sectionHeadingRow
values.comment: Heading row for a section

name: UiBase.SearchResults

values.name: searchAircraftList
values.comment: Formatted list, or nothing

values.name: angleDown
values.comment: Angle Down

values.name: downArrow
values.comment: Down arrow
